recalls.Description: The recall pertains to Sandford Family 6-Player Croquet Sets, which feature branding from either Garden Games or Big Game Hunters on their storage bags. Each set includes four adult mallets, two winning posts, a red and blue children's mallet, six balls, clips, hoops, and a storage bag, which can be identified by a blue bag with the Big Game Hunters logo or a green bag with the Garden Games logo.
recalls.Title: Sandford Family Croquet Sets Recalled for Lead Paint and Phthalate Violations; Exclusively Sold on Amazon by DOM Sports
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach DOM Sports at 877-725-5056 during business hours from 8:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. They can also email support@domsports.com or visit www.domsports.com/recalls.html for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Sandford Family 6-Player Croquet Set - Big Game Hunters branded
Recalled Sandford Family 6-Player Croquet Set - Garden Games branded

Manufacturers.Name: Garden Games Ltd, of United Kingdom

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon.com from May 2015 until June 2021 for approximately $225.

Importers.Name: DOM Enterprises & Mfg. Ltd, dba DOM Sports, of Canada

Hazards.Name: The red mallet, blue mallet, red hoop, and winning post have paint that exceeds federal lead paint limits, creating a risk of lead poisoning. Additionally, the coatings on the red and blue mallets contain prohibited levels of phthalates, which are harmful if ingested by young children and can lead to serious health issues.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must cease using the recalled croquet sets immediately and contact DOM Sports for instructions on sending a photo of the disposed product to support@domsports.com to obtain free replacement parts. DOM Sports and Amazon are reaching out to all known buyers.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall of Sandford Family Croquet Sets due to hazardous lead paint and phthalates. Contact DOM Sports for replacements.
